changelog.change: Master Report auto-generated from real site structure by omni-builder AI assistant.
Engine fix: if __name__ == __main__ guard added to build_sites.py — import no longer triggers full loop across all sites.
base.html must use {{ content }} only — engine does plain string replace, no Jinja2, no {% %} tags supported.
Global components (header, cookie banner) must be inlined directly into theme/base.html — engine has no include system.
assets/ directory must be copied into build/ or served from project root — build/ directory only contains generated HTML.
Never append serve command to build command — if server already running on port 8000 it will throw OSError. Build only, then refresh browser.
Images migrated from Jekyll project to assets/images (4 files).
Migration confirmed complete. Jekyll _data files not required — all content rendered into pages.json. Images migrated.
Cookie banner inlined into base.html for all sites. Jekyll {% include %} tags removed and replaced with working inlined HTML.
CSS files migrated from Jekyll _site compiled output into assets/css/. Assets copied into build/. assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build.
Added known_issue: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML — double header/footer risk on all sites migrated from Jekyll.
Added known_issue: use Jekyll _site compiled output as body_content source of truth where available. Extract <main> only.

GitHub Actions deployment confirmed working for site_HCR. SSH key stored as SSH_PRIVATE_KEY secret. LFS enabled for pages.json. build.py in repo root. Workflow at .github/workflows/deploy.yml. Push to main triggers full build and rsync deploy to Plesk.

Global known_issues patch: head_styles_in_jekyll lesson added to all Master Reports.
Stripped Jekyll tags from theme/base.html (site.baseurl, site.url, include, block, if, for, etc.).
Bulk build: SUCCESS. All 27 sites processed.
Fixed base.html: removed Jekyll tags, ensured { content } inside <main>.
Full bulk build of all 27 sites completed successfully. All sites now have a base.html template and build without errors.
Added GitHub Actions build-only workflow (no rsync). Created build.py and .gitattributes.
Initialized git repository locally, added .gitignore, created initial commit.
Pushed to GitHub: remote set to https://github.com/vswebsitedesign-ctrl/site_BAT.git. GitHub Actions will now build on push.
project_metadata.email updated to darren@buildingsandtrust.co.uk for contact form.
send.php addAddress updated to darren@buildingsandtrust.co.uk — contact form submissions now route to new email.

Deployment method confirmed: manual rsync only using ssh -i ~/.ssh/github_actions_bat to root@217.154.33.12. GitHub Actions workflow builds only — no rsync to Plesk. deploy.sh updated to use correct SSH key.
robots.txt and sitemap.xml created and deployed to live server. Sitemap contains 47,284 URLs generated from data/pages.json. robots.txt points to https://buildingsandtrust.co.uk/sitemap.xml.
404 fix: 100 x 301 redirects (plural slug -> singular service-location page) and 900 x 410 Gone responses added to vhost_nginx.conf. Backup saved as vhost_nginx.conf.bak.2026-06-01.
404 fix batch 2: GSC API used to pull 27,438 URLs. 3,702 missing from pages.json. 178 x 301 redirects and 3,524 x 410 Gone added to vhost_nginx.conf. Backup saved as vhost_nginx.conf.bak.2026-06-01c.

AI safety governance block added: AI_READ_THIS_FIRST, session_workflow, recovery, ai_incident_log. Adapted from site_cic and site_tales proven session safety patterns. All rules, mandatory workflows, deploy commands, and emergency rollback procedures now documented as first-read entry point for every AI session.
Best practices appended from site_tales master report: stronger commit-to-main rule, explicit build/ sed ban, session_start/end workflow, AI parsing requirement.

Full GSC audit completed. pages.json audited: 47,284 total pages, 12,418 with body content (Cornwall/Devon only), 34,866 empty shells built by build.py template, only 1 meta description exists. GSC exports: 35,227 queries, 56,719 pages. Cost guide title and meta fixed. 393 gaz-the-handyman 410s confirmed live in nginx. GSC CSV files moved to project root.
Pending tasks added to Master Report from GSC audit session. 7 tasks logged with priority and status.
Added page_templates, server config, nginx 410 status, and GSC setup details to Master Report. All findings from 2026-06-11 audit session now fully documented.

Session 2 complete. base.html and build.py updated to inject unique title/meta/canonical/og:url per page. Dynamic title and meta generation added to build.py covering all 47,287 pages. 34,866 UK location titles bulk updated to strong CTR pattern. probate-clearance and bereavement-clearance main service pages built and added to pages.json. Manchester/Nottingham/London/Redhill metas fixed. Homepage pulled from live server and added to pages.json as slug home. snapshot.sh and restore.sh created. 5 snapshots taken. Deploy pending task 8 (homepage copy step in build.py).

Session 3 complete. Homepage copy step added to build.py and verified. 26 service hub pages added to pages.json and verified locally. All service hub pages rendering correctly. Task 9 renamed task 11 — deploy pending. Total pages now 47,313. Snapshot taken: all-26-service-hub-pages-added.

Session 4 complete. Jekyll front matter removed from base.html. Nav CSS fixed desktop-first. Hero mobile layout fixed — image full width, h1/text/buttons in navy block below. Cookie consent badge confirmed working. robots.txt, sitemap.xml live and verified. Full deploy complete. 47,313 pages live.

Sitemap submitted to GSC with 47,313 URLs. Task 18 added — check GSC at 48hrs (2026-06-13) and again at 2 weeks (2026-06-25). AI to prompt user to pull fresh GSC data at next session after 2026-06-25.

changelog.task: Fixed 410 errors on all service hub pages
changelog.detail: Removed erroneous 410 nginx entries for all service hub slugs. house-clearance, probate-clearance, bereavement-clearance, garage-clearance, shed-clearance, hoarder-clearance, office-clearance, rubbish-removal, man-with-van, house-move, garden-rubbish-removal, attic-loft-clearances all confirmed returning 200.

known_issues.template_tags_in_base: base.html may contain {% %} or {{ title }} tags the engine cannot process — use {{ content }} only
known_issues.includes_not_rendered: engine has no include system — all global components must be inlined into base.html
known_issues.assets_not_in_build: assets/ directory is not copied to build/ automatically — serve from project root or copy manually
known_issues.port_clash: always check port 8000 is free before serving — build only and refresh if server already running
known_issues.assets_build_sync: assets/ must be re-copied into build/ after every build — cp -r assets/ build/assets/ from each site root
known_issues.body_content_full_html: body_content must never contain full standalone HTML documents (no <!DOCTYPE>, <html>, <head>, <body> tags). Strip to <main> contents only. Full documents cause double header/footer when wrapped by base.html. Fix: re.search(r"<main[^>]*>(.*?)</main>", body, re.DOTALL)
known_issues.jekyll_site_source_of_truth: Where a matching Jekyll source exists at /home/chubert/<PROJECT>/_site/, use compiled _site HTML as body_content source of truth. Extract <main> contents only. Never use AI-rewritten content when compiled source exists.
known_issues.github_secret_name: GitHub secret MUST be named SSH_PRIVATE_KEY — workflow references secrets.SSH_PRIVATE_KEY. Any other name causes Permission denied on rsync.
known_issues.lfs_checkout: pages.json tracked via Git LFS — workflow checkout must include lfs: true or build fails with empty JSON error.
known_issues.build_script: build.py must exist in repo root — GitHub Actions runner calls python3 build.py directly.
known_issues.yaml_multiline: Never embed multiline Python in deploy.yml — always use a separate build.py script to avoid YAML syntax errors.
known_issues.homepage_slug: Engine builds index slug as build/index/index.html — must be manually copied to build/index.html after every build: cp build/index/index.html build/index.html
known_issues.base_html_jekyll_tags: base.html may contain Jekyll tags (site.baseurl, site.title, prepend filters, block/endblock) the engine cannot process — audit base.html before first build and replace all with plain values or {{ content }}
known_issues.missing_js_assets: cookieconsent.umd.js and cookie-init.js may be referenced in base.html but not exist in assets/js/ — check and remove missing JS references from base.html
known_issues.head_styles_in_jekyll: Some Jekyll pages store CSS in <head> <style> blocks — extractor must pull <style> block from <head> AND prepend to body content. Affects pages using custom layouts without <main> tags.
known_issues.404_slugs_csv: Table.csv in data/ contains 1000 GSC 404 URLs. 100 redirected to singular service-location equivalents. 900 marked 410 Gone. Nginx rules in vhost_nginx.conf.

migration.reason: All Jekyll _data, _layouts, _includes content already rendered into data/pages.json body_content fields.

deployment_workflow.notes: Deployment to Plesk not configured; artifact uploads build/
deployment_workflow.github_actions_status: build-only — no rsync, never deploys to Plesk

mandatory_session_workflow: 1. READ this Master Report in full before any action
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run before EVERY risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. Commit and push only after local build verified clean
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git reset --hard HEAD~1
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.deploy_command: SERVER NOT YET CONFIGURED — do not deploy
AI_READ_THIS_FIRST.github_actions: build-only — NO rsync in deploy.yml — all deploys are manual rsync from local machine
ai_rules: NEVER modify files inside ./build/ — fully overwritten on every build
NEVER rewrite build.py from scratch — targeted edits only
NEVER run sed/perl/regex on build/ files
NEVER commit directly to main without human confirmation
NEVER guess paths or filenames — read Master Report first
NEVER deploy via GitHub Actions rsync — manual rsync only
NEVER leave send.php redirecting anywhere other than /thank-you/
NEVER delete fields from Master Report — append only
ALWAYS read Master Report in full before any bash command
ALWAYS snapshot before every risky change
ALWAYS verify changes with a read-back command before building
ALWAYS batch fact-finding commands into a single paste
ALWAYS confirm best practice and no guessing with every command
Content changes go in data/pages.json only
Layout changes go in theme/base.html only if unavoidable
build.py must generate robots.txt and sitemap.xml on every build
Homepage slug rule: after every build copy build/{homepage_slug}/index.html to build/index.html
NEVER commit directly to main during a session — no exceptions
NEVER attempt to run sed, perl, or text replacements on files inside ./build/ — it is ephemeral and fully overwritten on every build
AI must parse this entire Master Report completely before generating any bash commands — no blind regex strings or file overwrites allowed without tracking state dependencies first

session_workflow.description: Mandatory workflow for every AI session
session_workflow.before_any_work: Read Master_Report.json in full — no exceptions
session_workflow.before_risky_change: bash snapshot.sh "description" — snapshots all critical files
session_workflow.restore_from_snapshot: bash restore.sh snapshots/TIMESTAMP_label — restores all critical files
session_workflow.session_end: Commit with descriptive message, push to GitHub, update Master Report changelog
session_workflow.emergency_rollback: git checkout main && git branch -D session-BRANCHNAME
ai_mandatory_rules: Read Master Report before any work begins
Never commit directly to main during a session without human confirmation
Never make changes without telling the human exactly what will change first
Never run sed, perl, or regex on build/ files
Never rewrite build.py — targeted edits only
Never guess — always verify from disk
Batch all fact-finding into single commands
mandatory_session_workflow: 1. bash session_start.sh "label" — creates git branch, protects main
2. bash snapshot.sh "label" — run before EVERY risky change
3. bash restore.sh snapshots/X — instant restore if anything breaks
4. bash session_end.sh "msg" — merge to main, push, clean snapshots

recovery.description: Full site recovery from scratch — two commands only
recovery.note: All assets, content, and build logic are in the repo. pages.json tracked via Git LFS — ensure lfs: true on checkout.

ai_incident_log.description: Permanent log of AI errors on this project — read before every session
ai_incident_log.permanent_fix: AI must read this entire Master Report before generating any bash commands. No assumptions. No guessing. Verify everything from disk.

tasks.task: Check GSC sitemap status and indexing progress
tasks.detail: Sitemap submitted to GSC on 2026-06-11 with 47,313 URLs. Check 1: 48 hours after submission (2026-06-13) — confirm sitemap status shows Success, URL count close to 47,313, no coverage errors. Check 2: 2 weeks after submission (2026-06-25) — check indexing progress on service hub pages and location pages. AI NOTE: At start of next session after 2026-06-25, remind user to pull fresh GSC data and compare indexed URL count against 47,313 submitted. Look for coverage errors, excluded pages, and crawl anomalies.

tasks.task: UK service location pages body_content fixed
tasks.detail: 34,866 UK service location pages were rendering with empty body_content. Root cause: build.py had no dynamic template generation despite master report documenting it as intended. Fixed by adding make_uk_template() function to build.py. Pages now render with full hero, badges, gallery, service cards and CTA sections generated dynamically from slug at build time.

tasks.task: Rotating H1, title and meta description patterns added for UK pages
tasks.detail: 8 distinct H1 patterns, 8 title patterns and 8 meta description patterns added to build.py for all 34,866 UK service location pages. Rotation is hash-based on slug - deterministic across every build. Each pattern includes service name and location name for uniqueness. All patterns include a local signal. Cornwall/Devon pages with full body_content are unaffected.

tasks.task: Schema markup added sitewide and per UK service location page
tasks.detail: LocalBusiness schema (address: 5 Goole Road, Swinefleet, Goole DN14 8AR, areaServed: United Kingdom) and WebSite schema added to base.html sitewide. BreadcrumbList and Service schema injected per UK page via {{ page_schema }} token in base.html, generated dynamically by make_uk_schema() in build.py. Cornwall/Devon pages get sitewide schema only. Validated clean in Google Rich Results Test: Breadcrumbs, Local businesses, Organization - all 3 valid, zero errors, zero warnings.
